                let prefix = {\r\n
                    'admin': 'ADM',\r\n
                    'supervisor': 'SPV',\r\n
                    'petugas': 'PEG',\r\n
                    'masyarakat': 'MSY'\r\n
                }[this.role] || 'ROLE';\r\n

                let countStr = count.toString().padStart(4, '0');\r\n
                return `${prefix}-${this.year}-${countStr}`;\r\n
